creator: tijl@ulyssis.org
text:
On Tuesday 21 April 2009 20:37:39 Stanislav Sedov wrote:
> For now, committing this patch is no-point as it'll require the yet
> one rebuilding of all ports.

If you've already rebuilt everything then adding the .la won't change
anything, because it isn't referenced in any other .la file. When
lcms dependent ports are updated later on, their .la files will then
refer to liblcms.la instead of liblcms.so, but that doesn't make any
difference. Generally, adding doesn't break anything, it's removing and
modifying that cause trouble.
